Package org.openapitools.codegen.languages

Enum AbstractTypeScriptClientCodegen.ParameterExpander.Location

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<AbstractTypeScriptClientCodegen.ParameterExpander.Location>
org.openapitools.codegen.languages.AbstractTypeScriptClientCodegen.ParameterExpander.Location
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<AbstractTypeScriptClientCodegen.ParameterExpander.Location>, java.lang.constant.Constable
Enclosing class:
AbstractTypeScriptClientCodegen.ParameterExpander
public static enum AbstractTypeScriptClientCodegen.ParameterExpander.Location extends Enum<AbstractTypeScriptClientCodegen.ParameterExpander.Location>
Where the parameter is located in the request.

See e.g. OpenAPI 3.1 spec: Parameter Locations
